title: 3 Bedroom Bungalow with Swimming Pool for Sale Beruwala
description:
This Bungalow of 73.23 perches has been in the ownership of a European family as a holiday home and is in excellent condition. The property is located where there are other tourist houses and is less than a five minute walk to the sea.

The property consists of three buildings: Bungalow, swimming pool utility house and separate security/staff house.

The Bungalow (1763 sq ft) consists of a living area, dining area and kitchen area which are all open plan. It has 2 Bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms and a further room which is suitable as a 3rd bedroom . All bedrooms have integrated beds and built-in wardrobes and cupboards. All wood work for the interior furniture and roof is teak. 

The open veranda leads to a large patio area which is fully covered by cut & polished colourful granite tiles. The modern style swimming pool (20ft x 16ft) is integral to the patio.

The Utility house consist of three rooms: Pump room, laundry room and toilet room. There is a further shower to the outside wall.

The security/staff house (360ft) is set away from the bungalow and comprises of three rooms living room/bedroom, kitchen and bathroom with shower.

Water is supplied by tube well and is pumped to a water tower. Hot water is by means of a solar panel. The gardens are mature and comprise of mixed garden trees & horticulture plants as well as coconut palm trees.
